patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the nodes being moved to the end of the body instead of the beginning. The fix involves inserting the nodes at the start of the body.

The original patch incorrectly prepended text nodes to the element instead of the body. The refined fix will ensure that text nodes are moved to the start of the body, addressing the overfitting issue and ensuring general correctness.
patches.original_hypothesis: The issue is that the method is removing text nodes from their original position and appending them to the end of the body, instead of moving them to the beginning of the body.

patches.hypothesis: The issue is that the method moves non-blank text nodes to the end of the body instead of the beginning. We need to insert them at the start of the body.
The bug is caused by the method moving non-blank text nodes to the end of the body instead of the beginning. The fix involves inserting the text nodes at the start of the body.
